# Scholar's Pack

A Scholar's Pack contains the following items: [[backpack]], [[book]], [[ink]], [[ink_pen Pen]], [[lamp]], 10 flasks of [[oil]], 10 sheets of [[parchment]], and [[tinderbox]].
